raw: {"questions":[{"label":"What's on your mind","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately, James?","description":"Safe opener that lets him set context before any concern is introduced.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"landing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":1},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Rituals shift","name":"I've noticed you've been quieter in a few team rituals since the promotion decision — what's changed for you there?","description":"Uses an observable shift to invite his version of what changed without assuming the cause.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3},{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1}]},{"label":"Decision takeaway","name":"What did you take away from the promotion feedback that still feels true today?","description":"Surfaces what he actually heard and believed, rather than the manager's interpretation.","purpose":"topic","stage":"observation","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Unsaid piece","name":"What part of that decision feels most unfinished for you now?","description":"Gently probes unresolved disappointment without naming it for him.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3},{"axis":"engagement","delta":1}]},{"label":"Feedback gap","name":"What feedback do you think was missing from that conversation?","description":"Looks for the missing information that would change how he interprets the setback.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Mentoring fit","name":"How is the mentoring program fitting alongside your core product work right now?","description":"Tests whether the mentoring work is a healthy stretch or a quiet detour.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Path forward","name":"What path forward feels most real to you from here?","description":"Gets him to name a concrete next direction rather than staying in reaction mode.","purpose":"topic","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]},{"label":"Trade-off check","name":"What would you want to keep, and what would you want to change, in how you're spending your time?","description":"Forces a prioritisation trade-off and can reveal what is crowding out the work that matters.","purpose":"competency","stage":"underneath","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3},{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Support needed","name":"What would help make the next couple of weeks steadier for you?","description":"Closes on concrete support and next-step stability without opening a new issue.","purpose":"wellbeing","stage":"support","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":1},{"axis":"clarity","delta":1}]}]}
